title: Exact Finite Simplicial Homology Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite simplicial boundary coefficient QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Oriented-boundary coefficient contradiction where coeff_ac is forced to be -1 but the malformed row claims coeff_ac = 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite chain-complex rows only when they add distinct integer-linear solver pressure; keep homology invariance, exact sequences, and cohomology operations in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite simplicial complexes as deterministic finite-set and integer-linear-algebra obligations.
Replay boundary, chain-complex, and Betti-rank rows through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Keep promoted bad boundary coefficient rows tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence.
Add emitted certificates for false-boundary and rank rows once finite matrix proof routes are promoted.
Keep homology invariance, exact sequences, homotopy equivalence, cohomology operations, and general algebraic-topology theorems under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
